ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
Filter(
    col_NotesMenu,
    If(
        IsBlank(varNoteOpenBooking),
        MenuLabel = "Order",             // Only Order tab
        MenuLabel in ["Order", "Booking", "Site"]  // Show these 3 tabs
    )
)

Sort(
    Filter(
        col_Notes,


            Switch(
                varNoteView,

                "Order",
                'Note Type' = "Order"
                    && 'Order LookUp'.OrderReference = varNoteOpenOrder.OrderReference,

                "Booking",
                'Note Type' = "Booking"
                    && 'Booking LookUp'.BookingReference = varNoteOpenBooking.BookingReference
  
               
            )
        )
    ,
    'Created On',
    SortOrder.Descending
)
